anomalies.message: Latency appears improved, but accuracy or task metric validation is missing.
Cross-precision comparison shows a large latency delta.

explanations: Latency appears improved, but accuracy or task metric validation is missing.

recommendations: Add accuracy or task metric validation before accepting latency-only improvement.
